displayTitle: Pinpoint the Flaw: Time Is Distance

beats.narration: You've found an echo — now say exactly where it lives. Repair and code decisions hang on position, and position starts with time as distance.

payload.title: PINPOINT THE FLAW
payload.sub: The sweep is a ruler — time is distance.

beats.narration: Three readings pin a flaw. Time: the sweep reads soundpath. Amplitude: peaks when the beam centers it. The leg: first bounce or second.
An angled path splits in two: surface distance is soundpath times sine theta; depth is soundpath times cosine — until the beam bounces.

payload.heading: One soundpath, two coordinates
payload.note: AFTER THE BOUNCE: DEPTH = 2T − S·COS θ

beats.narration: Never park the probe. Traverse toward and away covering both legs, index along the weld with overlap, skew, and scan from both sides.

payload.heading: Map the whole flaw — never park

chips.s: Toward and away from the weld

beats.narration: Peak the amplitude, read the path, prove the leg, then cross-check displays until the position is unambiguous. Detective work — with a ruler.
